body: Found a bug? Please fill out the sections below. 👍 ### Issue Summary The `PayPal Setup` component contains untranslated hardcoded strings in the setup instructions section. ### Steps to Reproduce 1. Go to Apps 2. Install PayPal 3. Observe setup window ### Actual Results Strings are hardcoded ### Expected Results All user facing strings should use locale keys and the t() function to support internationalization.
title: PayPal Setup component contains untranslated strings (TODO)
